title: Lakhamandal temple, ruins and images

overview.short: Lakhamandal is an ancient Hindu temple complex, situated in the Jaunsar-Bawar region of Dehradun district in the state of Uttarakhand.
overview.description: Lakhamandal is an ancient Hindu temple complex, situated in the Jaunsar-Bawar region of Dehradun district in the state of Uttarakhand. The temple is dedicated to lord Shiva. This temple is popular among the Shaivites, who believe that a visit to this temple shrine will end their misfortunes. Lakhamandal gets its name from the two words: lakha (Lakh) meaning "many" and mandals meaning "temples" or "lingam".

topPlaces.name: Naugaon
topPlaces.description: Naugaon is a village of approximately 500 people in the Uttarkashi district of the Indian state of Uttarakhand. It is situated beside the Yamuna river.

topPlaces.name: Abhimanyu Cricket Academy
topPlaces.description: Abhimanyu Cricket Academy is a multi-purpose stadium in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. The ground is mainly used for organizing matches of football, cricket and other sports.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lakhamandal temple, ruins and images?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lakhamandal temple, ruins and images is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lakhamandal temple, ruins and images?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dehradun Airport (Jolly Grant) (61 km) and the nearest railway station is Dehradun Railway Station (46 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lakhamandal temple, ruins and images?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lakhamandal temple, ruins and images at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lakhamandal temple, ruins and images?
faq.a: Stays in Lakhamandal temple, ruins and images start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lakhamandal temple, ruins and images?
faq.a: The top attractions are Naugaon, Abhimanyu Cricket Academy.
